findings.description: The `case` column name from the その他単項目精査テストケース表 is not included in s5 hints. The source explicitly lists `case` as a required column (テストケースの簡単な説明) in the table, and it is a property name users would search for.
findings.source_evidence: | case | テストケースの簡単な説明 | (in the その他の単項目精査テストケース表)
